message:
feat(fnp-python): expand linalg submodule (diagonal/outer/trace/vector_norm/LinAlgError)

Extends fnp_python.linalg to cover the remaining Array-API + legacy
numpy.linalg surface missed in f4af92f:

- diagonal / outer / trace — already exposed at top level, now
  aliased under fnp_python.linalg.<name> to match numpy.linalg.

- vector_norm — Array-API-only (no top-level equivalent in numpy). Added
  linalg_vector_norm #[pyfunction] that lazy-loads numpy.linalg.vector_norm
  at call time (same pattern as linalg_cross) since it's not at top.

- LinAlgError — numpy.linalg's exception type. Re-exports it at
  fnp_python.linalg.LinAlgError so user code catching
  'except fnp_python.linalg.LinAlgError' works identically to
  'except numpy.linalg.LinAlgError'.

Probe extends k74v_5_nested_submodules_expose_numpy_native_names to
assert all 5 new attributes resolve. Workspace: 3743 passed under
parallel cargo test.
